assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddServerSideSessions() on the IdentityServer builder chain
assertions.rationale: .AddServerSideSessions() is present in the builder chain.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs configures AddOperationalStore with UseSqlServer using the connection string from configuration
Program.cs does not rely on the default in-memory session store for production use
assertions.rationale: Uses EF Core operational store with SQL Server.
